components/ui-button.source:
<!-- ui-button — a static button component (used standalone AND as the counter's child) -->
<button class="btn" [attr.id]="id" [class.btn--sm]="size === 'sm'" [class.btn--lg]="size === 'lg'" [disabled]="disabled" [innerHTML]="content"></button>

components/float-button.source:
<!-- button — a static sprig component. Inputs: id, disabled, size, content (the
     case's _innerHtml maps to the `content` input → [innerHTML]). -->
<button class="btn" [attr.id]="id" [class.btn--sm]="size === 'sm'" [class.btn--lg]="size === 'lg'" [disabled]="disabled" [innerHTML]="content"></button>
